title: Bhiwani Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Bhiwani with a Z-Score of +6.94. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current temperature in Bhiwani is extremely high, with a heat index exacerbated by low humidity of 14%.
The wind speed of 8.8 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief from the heat, with a critical level of heat stress.
The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is 23.3 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is 0.0 GG, showing no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
